lemon_market_new_listings.description: Poor condition.

The vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant body damage, including rust and multiple dents. The interior is heavily worn with torn upholstery. Mechanical systems are unreliable and require repair.

The vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has visible scratches and several small dents. The interior shows significant wear and staining. Mechanically, the engine and transmission are functional.

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as a project car or for parts. The engine runs but has a significant oil leak and a noticeable knock, while the transmission slips between second and third gears. Externally, there is extensive rust on the quarter panels and several large dents on the passenger side. The interior shows heavy wear, with torn upholstery and a non-functional climate control system. It will require substantial investment to be made roadworthy again.

This vehicle is in impeccable, mint condition, presenting exactly like a brand-new car from the showroom. The exterior paint is absolutely flawless, featuring a deep, mirror-like finish without a single chip, scratch, or swirl mark. Every body panel is perfectly aligned. Inside, the cabin is pristine; the leather remains supple and unscuffed, and all technology and luxury features function perfectly. Mechanically, the car is in top-tier shape with a complete service history, offering a driving experience that is smooth, quiet, and powerful. It has been meticulously garaged and cared for, making it a rare find for a discerning collector or buyer seeking perfection.

Unlock the potential in this budget-friendly find! While this vehicle is in poor condition and will definitely need some mechanical and cosmetic TLC, it's a fantastic opportunity for a handy DIY enthusiast or anyone looking for a rewarding project. It’s priced to sell and ready for someone with the right tools to bring it back to life!

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard of excellence. This specimen remains in showroom condition, boasting a flawless exterior finish and a pristine interior. Having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure mechanical perfection, this automobile offers an unrivaled ownership experience for the discerning buyer.

Hey there! I’m honestly so excited to pass this beauty along to a new owner. It is in absolutely pristine condition—seriously, it looks and feels like it just left the dealership! I’ve babied this car from day one, so it’s completely flawless inside and out. You really have to see it in person to believe how perfect it is. Let's get you behind the wheel!

This E46 M3 represents a superlative example of the S54-powered icon. The 3.2L naturally aspirated straight-six remains factory-spec with a razor-sharp throttle response thanks to its individual throttle bodies. All critical preventive maintenance has been meticulously addressed: the high-pressure VANOS system has been overhauled with upgraded seals, and the rod bearings were replaced with treated shells to ensure long-term mechanical longevity. The rear subframe has been professionally reinforced to mitigate common floor-pan fatigue, ensuring absolute structural integrity under high lateral loads. Power is delivered through a precise 6-speed
Mint condition. Single owner. Zero accidents. Garage kept. Full service history.

Offering a truly exceptional example of automotive preservation. This vehicle is in pristine, showroom-quality condition, having been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage since day one. The exterior paint retains its deep, factory luster with a professional ceramic coating applied to ensure long-term protection; there are absolutely no chips, scratches, or swirl marks to be found. Inside, the cabin remains in an 'as-new' state, featuring supple, uncreased leather upholstery, original premium floor mats, and that distinct new-car scent. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the dual-zone climate control, functions

Presented in impeccable condition, this vehicle exemplifies automotive excellence. Every aspect of this motorcar has been preserved to a showroom standard, reflecting a history of fastidious care and meticulous maintenance. From the pristine upholstery to the flawless mechanical operation, it offers an unrivaled driving experience for the most discerning connoisseur. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a specimen that remains indistinguishable from new.

Presenting an exemplary specimen of automotive excellence, maintained in pristine condition. This vehicle has been curated to meet the most exacting standards, offering an aesthetic and mechanical profile indistinguishable from its original showroom state. A definitive acquisition for the discerning driver who demands peerless quality and uncompromising performance.

Hey there! I am honestly so excited to find a new home for this absolute beauty. It’s in truly flawless condition—it seriously looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve babied this car since day one, keeping it tucked away in the garage, and it drives like a total dream. If you’ve been looking for perfection, you just found it. Come take a look and fall in love!

Offering a museum-grade E46 M3, this specimen features the iconic S54 3.2L inline-six with individual throttle bodies and double-VANOS valve timing. The drivetrain is anchored by a precise Getrag six-speed manual and a variable M differential lock. This unit has undergone comprehensive preventative maintenance, including rod bearing replacement and professional rear subframe reinforcement. Performance is enhanced by a Bilstein PSS10 coilover system and Brembo four-piston calipers, providing exceptional damping and thermal capacity. The exterior retains its factory depth with zero swirl marks, while the interior features pristine Nappa leather and an unblemished Alcantara headliner. A true collector-tier vehicle with a fully documented service portfolio.
Mint condition. Garage kept. Single owner. Full service history. No accidents. Original paint. Interior like new. Mechanically perfect.

Experience automotive perfection with this meticulously preserved masterpiece. This vehicle presents in a showroom-ready state, boasting a mirror-like finish on the original paintwork with absolutely zero imperfections, dings, or swirls. Inside, the cabin remains a sanctuary of luxury; the premium leather upholstery is supple and free of wear, still retaining that distinct new-car aroma. Every electronic component functions flawlessly, and the climate control is ice-cold. Under the hood, the engine bay is spotlessly maintained, reflecting a rigorous maintenance schedule documented by a complete set of service records. Garage-kept since day one and driven only in fair weather, this car offers the performance and aesthetic of a brand-new vehicle. It is, quite simply, the finest example of its kind available on the market today.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled distinction. This vehicle remains in impeccable, showroom-state condition, reflecting a legacy of meticulous preservation and uncompromising maintenance. Every surface and mechanical component adheres to the highest standards of excellence, offering the discerning collector a rare opportunity to acquire a truly pristine example of engineering mastery. This is an investment in quality for those who refuse to settle for anything less than perfection.

Presenting an exemplary specimen maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This vehicle represents a rare opportunity to acquire a showroom-grade asset characterized by its pristine aesthetic and mechanical integrity. Every detail has been meticulously preserved, ensuring an uncompromising driving experience for the discerning collector or enthusiast. We invite qualified inquiries for this superlative offering.

Hey there! I'm honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for a new home. This car is in absolutely incredible shape—it’s basically like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve taken such good care of it, and it drives like a dream. You won't find a scratch on it. If you're looking for perfection, this is the one! Feel free to reach out with any questions!

This E92 M3 is a superlative example of the high-revving S65 4.0L V8 era. The naturally aspirated powerplant delivers a linear torque curve and an intoxicating 8,400 RPM redline, mated to a lightning-fast 7-speed M-DCT. This specimen features a perfectly preserved chassis with Electronic Damper Control (EDC) and an active M differential for optimal lateral grip. Preventative maintenance is comprehensive, including documented rod bearing replacement and throttle actuator service. The exterior retains its factory luster with zero paint imperfections, while the interior remains in showroom state with supple leather and intact carbon-structure trim. A mechanically flawless, collector-grade vehicle for the discerning enthusiast.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No scratches or dents. Smoke-free interior. Full service history. Runs like new.

Presenting a truly exceptional, showroom-quality vehicle that stands as a testament to meticulous ownership. This car is in absolute mint condition, having been strictly garage-kept and professionally detailed throughout its life. The exterior features a flawless, mirror-finish paint job with no stone chips, scratches, or blemishes, complemented by original alloy wheels free of any curb rash. Inside, the cabin is immaculate and remains smoke-free; the premium leather upholstery is supple with zero signs of wear, and every electronic feature functions exactly as it did the day it left the factory. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, boasting a complete, documented service history and a driving experience that is tight, responsive, and indistinguishable from new. This is a rare opportunity to own a collector-grade example that will satisfy even the most discerning enthusiast.

We are proud to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, currently preserved in impeccable, showroom condition. Every aspect of this automobile—from its flawless exterior finish to its pristine, untouched interior—reflects a standard of care that is truly beyond reproach. Mechanically superior and aesthetically perfect, this unit represents a rare opportunity for the discerning buyer to acquire an investment-grade example of automotive excellence. We invite serious inquiries to experience a vehicle that stands as a testament to uncompromising quality.

We are proud to present this impeccably preserved vehicle, currently maintained in showroom condition. Every facet of this motorcar reflects a standard of absolute excellence, from its flawless exterior finish to the pristine, smoke-free interior. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle that has been curated with the utmost precision, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from new. A definitive acquisition for the discerning automotive enthusiast.

Hey there! 👋 Honestly, you’ve gotta see this beauty in person to believe it! It’s been my absolute pride and joy, kept in such incredible shape that it still looks and smells like it just rolled off the lot. Everything is pristine—not a single scratch or dent to be found, just pure perfection. I'm only letting it go because I'm upgrading, but I know the next owner is going to fall in love with it just like I did. Let's get you behind the wheel!

Offering a collector-grade 997.2 Carrera S, meticulously maintained and presented in concours-ready condition. This specimen features the 3.8L naturally aspirated DFI flat-six, producing a broad torque curve and a crisp 7,400 RPM redline. The 6-speed longitudinal manual transmission provides tactile, precise shifts with no synchro drag, paired with a factory-optioned limited-slip differential. Equipped with PASM (Porsche Active Suspension Management) and the Sport Chrono Package Plus, the chassis dynamics remain sharp and responsive. The exterior paint retains full factory depth with zero stone chips or swirl marks, while the interior displays no bolster wear or soft-touch plastic degradation. Comprehensive service records document rigorous preventative maintenance, including recent fluid analysis and borescope inspection, confirming the mechanical integrity of this turn-key enthusiast icon.
Mint condition. Single owner. Full service records. No accidents. Pristine interior and exterior. Ready for immediate sale.

This vehicle is the definition of showroom quality. Meticulously maintained and garage-kept since day one, the exterior retains its original deep-luster factory paint without a single swirl mark, scratch, or stone chip. Inside, the cabin smells factory-fresh; the premium leather upholstery remains supple and free of any creases or wear, while the dashboard and trim are absolutely flawless. Every feature—from the advanced infotainment system to the climate control—functions perfectly. Mechanically, this car is peerless, benefiting from a rigorous preventative maintenance schedule documented in a comprehensive service history. It drives exactly as it did the day it rolled off the lot: smooth, powerful, and exceptionally quiet. This is a rare opportunity to own a collector-grade example that has been treated with the utmost care by a dedicated owner. All original keys, manuals, and service records are included.

Presenting an exceptional vehicle of unrivaled caliber. This specimen has been maintained to an exacting standard, presenting in pristine, showroom condition. Every facet of this motorcar reflects a commitment to excellence, from its flawless exterior finish to its impeccably preserved interior. A rare opportunity for the discerning collector who demands nothing less than absolute perfection.
